zh.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan於1019年出生在英國威爾斯。她和Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon至少有1個兒子。她去世於1050年在她的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan于1019年出生在英国威尔斯。她和Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon至少有1个儿子。她去世于1050年在她的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan was born in 1019, in Wales, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon. She died in 1050, in her hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan est née en 1019, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon. Elle est décédée en 1050, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan wurde 1019 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1050 im Alter von 31 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan è nata il nel 1019 nel Galles, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon. Morì nel 1050, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwganは1019年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた。彼女はMaenyrch ap Dryffin of Breconとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1050年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan(은)는 1019년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 그녀의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan nasceu em 1019, em Gales, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon. Ela faleceu em 1050, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan родилась в 1019 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon. Она умерла в 1050 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Ferch Cadwgan nació en 1019, en Gales, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon. Murió en 1050, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.
